overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student walking through the castle grounds at dusk, transitioning from outdoor courtyards through covered walkways and into the grand entrance hall with moving staircases, ending in upper corridors.

agents.ego_description: walking through the cobblestone courtyard toward the stone staircase

entered.detail: stone bench with wooden slats along the right wall
lit iron lantern on a stone pedestal
wide stone staircase leading up the castle wall
tall weathered stone wall with gothic architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open castle courtyard with cobblestone ground, passing a stone bench and iron lantern, approaching a stone staircase leading up the exterior wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior stone staircase and upper terrace

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior stone staircase alongside the gothic castle walls

entered.detail: tall pointed spires of the castle towers against the dusk sky
ornate stone balustrade along the staircase edge
gothic arched entrance at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the exterior stone stairs, with gothic spires becoming visible against the dusk sky, moving toward an arched entrance at the terrace level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cloister walkway with arched openings

events.description: entering the covered cloister with arched columns overlooking the courtyard
lighting shifts to warmer artificial sconces deeper in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway with arched windows overlooking the courtyard

notable_agents.action: figure sitting on a bench visible through the arches in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered cloister with stone columns and arches, wall sconces providing warm light, with views of the courtyard visible through the openings where a figure sits on a bench.

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open courtyard before the main castle entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the courtyard toward the large wooden doors of the castle entrance

elaborate gothic stone facade with pointed arches
tall castle towers with crenellations

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cloister, the character crosses an open courtyard toward the imposing main entrance of the castle, with large wooden doors and gothic towers visible against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with double staircase and Hogwarts crest

events.description: entering the castle through the large wooden doors
transition from natural dusk light to warm artificial torchlight
beginning to ascend the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and approaching the large Hogwarts crest before ascending the staircase

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the right staircase

entered.detail: large illuminated Hogwarts crest mounted on the far wall between staircases
twin marble staircases with ornate balustrades
wall-mounted torches with flickering flames
tall gothic stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: Inside the castle, the character enters the grand hall dominated by the illuminated Hogwarts crest, with students moving on the twin staircases, warm torchlight replacing the outdoor dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor corridor with statues and arched doorways

events.description: reaching the top of the grand staircase and entering the upper corridor
walking toward the large wooden door at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase and proceeding through the upper corridor toward a large wooden door

notable_agents.action: student walking ahead toward the large door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: stone statue in a wall niche
ornate wall lantern lighting the corridor
large wooden door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to the upper floor, passing statues in wall niches and lit wall sconces, following another student toward a large wooden door at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, dusk-lit castle courtyards into the warm, torch-lit interior of the grand hall and its upper corridors. It begins on the cobblestone ground of an open courtyard, passing a stone bench and iron lantern before ascending an exterior staircase toward gothic spires. As the character moves through a covered cloister of stone columns and arches, the scene shifts back outdoors to cross a final courtyard toward the imposing wooden doors of the main entrance. The camera then transitions inside to the grand hall, where the cool dusk light is replaced by the glow of the Hogwarts crest and torchlight reflecting off twin staircases. Finally, the movement carries upward to the upper floor, passing statues in wall niches while following another student toward a large wooden door at the end of the corridor.
